query:
SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.outlet_id, o.order_type, o.created_at, 
       k.id as kot_id, k.outlet_id as kot_outlet_id, k.status as kot_status, k.printed_at
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN kot_queue k ON o.id = k.order_id
WHERE o.order_number = '00137' OR o.id = 137
ORDER BY o.id, k.id;
